user.title: Football Match Tracker
user.description: Choose a competition to track teams from.

custom_league.title: Custom League
custom_league.description:
Enter a league code using the SportSRC API.

Common codes:
- WC = World Cup
- EC = European Championship
- CL = Champions League
- PL = Premier League
- BL1 = Bundesliga
- PD = La Liga
- SA = Serie A
- FL1 = Ligue 1

error.league_not_found: League not found. Check the code.
error.cannot_fetch_teams: Could not fetch teams for this league. Check the code or try a different competition.
error.no_teams_selected: Select at least one team to track.

init.title: Manage Football Tracker
init.description: Add or remove teams to track.

error.cannot_fetch_teams: Could not fetch teams for this league.
error.no_teams_selected: Select at least one team to track.
